meaning: n.(原产于法国的)(一杯)橘味白酒
examples: It is also flavoring Cointreau liqueur.
Grey goose vodka, rum, tequila, cointreau, lime juice and coke.
With one of the guests I had to resort to liqueur - Cointreau - to jolly him along.
She said the pair had asked the presenters to smell their breath and said they had been drinking Cointreau and tequila.
